chunks.title: Command to Write the Prophecy
chunks.reason: Introduction and command to record the coming restoration.

chunks.title: Prophecy of Restoration for Jacob
chunks.reason: Detailed oracle describing distress, deliverance, and healing.

chunks.title: Restoration of the City and Covenant
chunks.reason: Promise of rebuilding, prosperity, and renewed covenant relationship.

chunks.title: The Storm of Yahweh
chunks.reason: Conclusion regarding the wrath against the wicked and future understanding.
